name: HVC Fan Coil Temperature Control Valve
desc: HVAC fan coil control valve, precisely regulates coolant/hot water flow based on room temperature feedback, RS485, 15–30% energy savings.
overview: The HVC Fan Coil Temperature Control Valve is the core control element in HVAC fan coil systems. It precisely regulates chilled/hot water flow to each fan coil unit based on room temperature feedback, maintaining room temperature at the set point and achieving 15–30% energy savings across the entire chiller system. Compatible with AC220V and DC24V power. RS485 for direct thermostat connection.
features: Precise room temperature control: auto-adjusts valve opening based on real-time sensor feedback — ±0.5°C accuracy
Energy savings 15–30%: eliminates over-supply of cooling/heating medium to the fan coil unit
Fan speed interlocking: when valve opening is small, fan speed automatically reduces — reduces noise and saves energy
Built-in freeze protection and overcurrent protection — extends actuator and valve service life
Direct RS485 connection to room thermostat — no intermediate controller needed
Dual power supply: AC 220V ±10% and DC 24V ±5%
